subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen hath made mention of His handmaidens, and shall continue to do so, God willing, that all may at all times be mindful in remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی اماء خود را ذکر نموده و خواهد نمود انشاء الله کل در جمیع احیان بذکر
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement
